title: Better Sheep!
description: Same ol' sheep we love, new model!
body:
Pretty straight-forward. This improves the texture & model of sheep! 

REQUIRES: [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features/versions) & [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)

Ported from my PlanetMC page: [Better Sheep!](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/better-sheep-6331512/)
